questions.question: Compare the execution times of a serial algorithm and a parallel algorithm implemented in a programming language to solve the same problem. What factors would you consider when designing a parallel algorithm to minimize the difference in execution time?
questions.hint: Consider the number of cores, data structure, and synchronization mechanisms

questions.question: Write a Java code snippet to measure the execution time of a serial algorithm versus a parallel algorithm using threading. Record the results and compare the difference in execution time.
questions.hint: Use the System.nanoTime() method to measure execution time

questions.question: Suppose we have a large dataset that can be divided into n partitions. Write a Python code snippet to measure the execution time of a parallel algorithm using multiprocessing or concurrent.futures to process each partition in parallel. Record the difference in execution time for different values of n.
questions.hint: Use the time module to measure execution time
